feedback_items.title: Placeholder Issue 1: Improve Accessibility of Button
feedback_items.why_it_matters: Ensures all users, including those with disabilities, can interact with the application effectively. Neglecting accessibility can lead to legal issues and alienate a significant portion of users.
what_to_do: Add ARIA labels to the button element to provide context for screen readers.
Ensure sufficient color contrast between the button text and background.
Verify keyboard navigation is functional for the button.
feedback_items.wireframe_changes: Add a note in the wireframe to specify ARIA labels for button elements.

feedback_items.title: Placeholder Issue 2: Optimize Image Loading for Performance
feedback_items.why_it_matters: Slow loading images can frustrate users and increase bounce rates. Optimizing images improves perceived performance and user engagement.
what_to_do: Compress images without sacrificing too much visual quality using tools like TinyPNG or ImageOptim.
Implement lazy loading for images below the fold to reduce initial page load time.
Use responsive images with different sizes for various screen resolutions.
feedback_items.wireframe_changes: Indicate image optimization strategies in the design documentation.

quick_wins.change: Increase font size of error messages.

implementation_order: Increase font size of error messages.
